title: Parque Ecoturístico Xhitey
description: A forested park ideal for hiking, mountain biking, and camping. With scenic trails, picnic areas, and elevated viewpoints, Xhitey offers a refreshing connection to nature and a peaceful break from city life.

title: Las Secuoyas Park
description: Home to young redwood trees imported from the U.S., this park surprises visitors with its towering conifers, sculptures, and quiet walking paths. It’s a unique blend of exotic flora and local tranquility.

title: Dexcaní Alto Trail
description: A rugged hiking route through pine forests and rocky terrain, leading to dramatic cliffs and panoramic vistas. It’s a favorite among climbers and nature lovers seeking solitude and elevation.
